Release Credit Idempotency Gate

The release readiness checker must verify that the postgres database has the unique credit index required by duplicate-safe accounting before a package is considered mining-ready.

read-only Postgres schema gate blocks unsafe deploys

Problem

Pool source PR #69 makes AddCredits use ON CONFLICT (block_hash, miner_address). Existing databases will fail that query unless the matching unique index exists.

Fix

Add credits_block_miner_unique to the packaged schema and make release-readiness-check.py verify the index on existing installs.

Boundary

This is read-only readiness validation plus packaged schema alignment. It does not mutate a running database.

Acceptance

  • Fresh installs create credits_block_miner_unique.
  • Existing installs fail readiness if the unique index is missing.
  • Tests prove the checker reports missing indexes clearly.
  • The HTML release-readiness runbook documents the new gate.
